name: Neat Pulse Endpoint Monitoring
description: Monitors Neat Pulse room devices via the Neat Pulse cloud API. Retrieves device info (firmware, connectivity, storage, room name) and sensor data (temperature, humidity, CO2, VOC, illumination, people count). Supports direct device ID lookup or automatic discovery by serial number. Includes a Reboot action.

others: A valid Neat Pulse API Bearer token (neatAPIKey)
Optionally, the Neat endpoint ID (cloudControllerDeviceID) for direct lookup; if omitted, the device is identified by its serial number in the Neat inventory
